CVE-2019-19308.title: In text_to_glyphs in sushi-font-widget.c in gnome-font-viewer 3.3 ...
CVE-2019-19308.summary: In text_to_glyphs in sushi-font-widget.c in gnome-font-viewer 3.34.0, there is a NULL pointer dereference while parsing a TTF font file that lacks a name section (due to a g_strconcat call that returns NULL).
